lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Whooooo? Meeeee? Oh, I make sure *hic* the cart traffic proceedsh *hic* in an orderly fishion. Fashion. Yes.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: North, north, north *hic* north to Keldagrim!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: One ticket to ehm... *hic* Keldagrim. That's 2... 3.... *hic* 100 glittering gold coins!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I'm sorry, [sir/madam], but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Thanksh a lot human! Remember to come back for more shtout whenever you want! *hic*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I'm sorry, [sir/madam], but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Waith a shecond... that'sh only 50 coinsh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No it's not, you're seeing double from all that drinking, remember? So it's actually 100 coins.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Errr... yesh, I shuppose you're right.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Just remember, wherever you go... ehm... *hic* oh, forget it.

lines.text: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.
